title: Troy the Bharat Putra
overview: An abandoned dog in the border area of Poonch, Kashmir was found by the childless couple Major Bharat Kumar Reddy of Indian Army and his wife Nandini Srinivasan Reddy. Major Bharat who is the big fan of the movie TROY, so Nandini named him Troy. The four legged son connected with Major Bharat by his soul.
